expectations.text: Prompt contains a clear 'I want to... so that...' task statement
Final prompt is entirely in English
Prompt contains SUCCESS BRIEF with all 4 fields (output type, reaction, does not sound like, success means)
Prompt contains collaborative refinement instructions (clarifying questions, execution plan)
Prompt references context files to be read before starting
Prompt contains Always/Never rules extracted from the reference
Prompt does NOT contain 'act as' or 'you are a' role assignments
Prompt tells AI to read context file fully and stop if about to break rules
